---
title: "Chris Varghese"
---

![](assets/cover_2.png){.front-figure fig-alt="Blue academic illustration of a campus with data science and AI motifs"}

::: {.intro}
### Chris Varghese

I am a PhD candidate at the University of Auckland, aspiring GI surgeon, and data scientist at Mayo Clinic. My interests include improving [surgical recovery](http://srslab.auckland.ac.nz/), translational [AI](https://www.mayo.edu/research/labs/surgical-artificial-intelligence-innovation/overview), and [GI physiology](https://www.alimetry.com/clinical-evidence-row).
:::
